req.title: Transaction dispute (idempotency variant)
req.statement: A customer shall dispute a transaction within 60 days of posting; disputes beyond 60 days shall be rejected. The operation must be idempotent: duplicate submission with the same Idempotency-Key must return the original result.

doc.reasoning: The requirement has three distinct testable dimensions: (1) valid dispute within 60 days (EP positive partition), (2) dispute beyond 60 days rejected with 422 (NEG/EP negative partition), (3) boundary at exactly day 59 vs day 60 (BVA), and (4) idempotency via duplicate Idempotency-Key (STC state transition from 'created' back to same result). A Decision Table case covers the combined conditions of age and idempotency key presence. Tests are ordered: positive EP, negative NEG, boundary BVA day-59 (last valid day), boundary BVA day-60 (first invalid day), and idempotency STC. Each test seeds its own transaction via <create_transaction> fixture parameter and tears down via <cleanup_dispute> to remain idempotent across runs.

tests.name: test_dispute_within_60_days_returns_201_and_provisional_credit
preconditions: Transaction posted 30 days ago (well within valid partition)
actions: POST /disputes with valid transaction_id, reason, and unique Idempotency-Key
trace: R-FIN-084: dispute within 60 days shall be created
R-FIN-084: provisional credit applied on creation
tests.executable:
def test_dispute_within_60_days_returns_201_and_provisional_credit(api_client, create_transaction, cleanup_dispute):
    txn = create_transaction(age_days=30)
    idempotency_key = <generate_uuid>()
    payload = {
        "transaction_id": txn["id"],
        "reason": "unauthorized_charge"
    }
    headers = {"Idempotency-Key": idempotency_key}

    resp = api_client.post("/disputes", json=payload, headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert "dispute_id" in body
    assert body["provisional_credit"] is True
    assert body["status"] == "pending"
    cleanup_dispute(body["dispute_id"])

tests.name: test_dispute_beyond_60_days_returns_422
preconditions: Transaction posted 61 days ago (outside valid window)
actions: POST /disputes with transaction_id for a 61-day-old transaction and unique Idempotency-Key
expected: Response body contains error code DISPUTE_WINDOW_EXPIRED
trace: R-FIN-084: disputes beyond 60 days shall be rejected
tests.executable:
def test_dispute_beyond_60_days_returns_422(api_client, create_transaction):
    txn = create_transaction(age_days=61)
    idempotency_key = <generate_uuid>()
    payload = {
        "transaction_id": txn["id"],
        "reason": "unauthorized_charge"
    }
    headers = {"Idempotency-Key": idempotency_key}

    resp = api_client.post("/disputes", json=payload, headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("error_code") == "DISPUTE_WINDOW_EXPIRED"

    verify_resp = api_client.get("/disputes", params={"transaction_id": txn["id"]})
    assert verify_resp.json().get("total", 0) == 0

tests.name: test_dispute_on_day_59_accepted_boundary
preconditions: Transaction posted exactly 59 days ago (last day of valid window)
actions: POST /disputes with transaction_id for a 59-day-old transaction and unique Idempotency-Key
trace: R-FIN-084: boundary — day 59 is within 60-day window, must be accepted
tests.executable:
def test_dispute_on_day_59_accepted_boundary(api_client, create_transaction, cleanup_dispute):
    txn = create_transaction(age_days=59)
    idempotency_key = <generate_uuid>()
    payload = {
        "transaction_id": txn["id"],
        "reason": "duplicate_charge"
    }
    headers = {"Idempotency-Key": idempotency_key}

    resp = api_client.post("/disputes", json=payload, headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert "dispute_id" in body
    assert body["provisional_credit"] is True
    cleanup_dispute(body["dispute_id"])

tests.name: test_dispute_on_day_60_rejected_boundary
preconditions: Transaction posted exactly 60 days ago (first day outside valid window)
actions: POST /disputes with transaction_id for a 60-day-old transaction and unique Idempotency-Key
expected: Response body contains error code DISPUTE_WINDOW_EXPIRED
trace: R-FIN-084: boundary — day 60 exceeds the exclusive 60-day limit, must be rejected

tests.name: test_duplicate_idempotency_key_returns_original_result
preconditions: First dispute POST has already succeeded (state: dispute created)
actions: POST /disputes with the same payload and same Idempotency-Key a second time
expected: HTTP 200 OK or 201 Created (same as original response)
Response body dispute_id matches the original dispute_id
Response body provisional_credit matches original value
No duplicate dispute record created in the system
trace: R-FIN-084: idempotent operation — duplicate submission with same Idempotency-Key returns original result
R-FIN-084: STC transition from 'created' state must not fork to a second 'created' state
tests.executable:
def test_duplicate_idempotency_key_returns_original_result(api_client, create_transaction, cleanup_dispute):
    txn = create_transaction(age_days=10)
    idempotency_key = <generate_uuid>()
    payload = {
        "transaction_id": txn["id"],
        "reason": "unauthorized_charge"
    }
    headers = {"Idempotency-Key": idempotency_key}

    first_resp = api_client.post("/disputes", json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert first_resp.status_code in (200, 201)
    first_body = first_resp.json()
    original_dispute_id = first_body["dispute_id"]

    second_resp = api_client.post("/disputes", json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert second_resp.status_code in (200, 201)
    second_body = second_resp.json()

    assert second_body["dispute_id"] == original_dispute_id
    assert second_body["provisional_credit"] == first_body["provisional_credit"]

    all_disputes = api_client.get("/disputes", params={"transaction_id": txn["id"]})
    assert all_disputes.json()["total"] == 1
    cleanup_dispute(original_dispute_id)

tests.name: test_dispute_missing_idempotency_key_returns_400
preconditions: Request submitted without Idempotency-Key header (decision: key absent)
actions: POST /disputes with valid payload but no Idempotency-Key header
expected: Response body contains error indicating Idempotency-Key is required
trace: R-FIN-084: idempotency requires Idempotency-Key; absence is an invalid input combination per decision table
R-FIN-084: DT row: age_valid=true, idempotency_key=absent => reject
tests.executable:
def test_dispute_missing_idempotency_key_returns_400(api_client, create_transaction):
    txn = create_transaction(age_days=5)
    payload = {
        "transaction_id": txn["id"],
        "reason": "unauthorized_charge"
    }

    resp = api_client.post("/disputes", json=payload)

    assert resp.status_code == 400
    body = resp.json()
    error_text = str(body).lower()
    assert "idempotency" in error_text or "idempotency-key" in error_text
